description: You are an IT Systems Manager at a mid-size SaaS company responding to a P1 production incident involving database connection pool exhaustion on db-prod-01. Using Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!), coordinate the response by creating a private channel named 'inc-20260306-db-outage' with the topic 'P1 | Database Connection Pool Exhaustion | Started: 2026-03-06 14:30 UTC'. Invite responders ops.lead, backend.dev, and dba.admin to the channel. The channel must include a pinned incident summary (covering Impact, Current Status, and Next Steps) and a status update regarding the root cause investigation. In the #production-alerts channel, reply to the database exhaustion alert thread with a link to the incident channel. Additionally, message qa.engineer directly to request a regression test plan for the fix.
